---
title: "Cell-Type-Specific Biomarkers in Human Liver Fibrosis"
subtitle: "Reproducible single-cell discovery pipeline — full report"
date: today
params:
  results_dir: "results"
  primary: "gse136103"
  datasets: "gse136103,gse244832"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
# | tags: [parameters]
results_dir = "results"
primary = "gse136103"
datasets = "gse136103,gse244832"
```

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd

RD = Path(results_dir)
DS = [d for d in datasets.split(",") if d]


def read_tsv(p):
    p = Path(p)
    return pd.read_csv(p, sep="\t") if p.exists() else pd.DataFrame()
```

## Overview

This report is generated by the liver-fibrosis pipeline. It summarizes QC,
integration, annotation, donor-aware differential expression, pathway and cell-cell
communication mechanism analysis, and the AI/ML biomarker prioritization that yields the
ranked candidate table. Method rationale and citations are in `docs/methods.md`; written
answers to the screening questions are in `docs/written_answers.md`.

## QC summary

```{python}
for ds in DS:
    df = read_tsv(RD / f"02_qc/{ds}/qc_summary.tsv")
    if not df.empty:
        print(f"### {ds}")
        display(df)
```

## Integration (scIB) and annotation

```{python}
for ds in DS:
    print(f"### {ds}")
    display(read_tsv(RD / f"03_integrate/{ds}/scib_metrics.tsv"))
    display(read_tsv(RD / f"04_annotate/{ds}/compartment_validation.tsv"))
```

## Ranked biomarker / target candidates

```{python}
scores = read_tsv(RD / "08_score/candidate_scores.tsv")
display(scores.head(20))
```

## Cross-dataset reproducibility

```{python}
display(read_tsv(RD / "09_crossdataset/repro_scores.tsv").head(20))
```

## Mechanism: pathways and cell-cell communication

```{python}
for ds in DS:
    print(f"### {ds}")
    display(read_tsv(RD / f"06_pathway/{ds}/activity.tsv").head(15))
    display(read_tsv(RD / f"07_ccc/{ds}/differential_ccc.tsv").head(15))
```
